rag_rules: Insert AGREE annex blocks in valid component type scopes, considering subcomponent ports and connections.
generic_rules: Preserve AADL architecture when inserting generated AGREE annex blocks.
Use valid variables or outputs to represent subcomponent ports in component type contracts.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are written inside `annex agree {**... **};` blocks.
Use `eq name : type = expression;` to declare equations and `const name : type = value;` to declare constants.
anti_patterns: Avoid using implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type annexes.
Do not encode AADL timing properties as AGREE expressions unless the model exposes explicit typed ports or constants.
